title: haplopappus phyllocephalus var. annuus
intro: Haplopappus phyllocephalus var. annuus is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Haplopappus phyllocephalus var. annuus include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
